fixes_applied.description: Replaced hardcoded marginTop: 12 and marginBottom: 4 in notFoundText with semantic.space.md and semantic.space.xs inline styles
Removed hardcoded letterSpacing: 0.5 from SectionHeader. The labelMedium Paper variant handles its own typography.

Replaced vanity tests for AC2, AC4, AC5 with proper component rendering tests using react-test-renderer. Tests now mock useSavedRouteDetail hook, render the component, and verify correct testIDs, props, and router.back() wiring.

Fixed pre-existing type error: semantic.color.surface.elevated does not exist on SemanticColorSet. Changed to surfaceVariant.default which is the correct semantic token for elevated surface backgrounds.

typecheck: pre-existing errors only (46 errors, none in modified files)
lint: pre-existing config error (react-native plugin not found)
